name: Qualified Terminable Interest Property (QTIP) Election

eligibility.description: The spouse must have a qualifying income interest for life, and the donor must make an irrevocable election on a gift tax return.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: An election to treat a life estate for a spouse as a deductible marital gift, allowing the donor to control the ultimate disposition of the property while deferring tax.
